name: Take Back the Night

abilities.name: Each Flaw Tells a Story
abilities.text: After resolving an attack action that damaged this model, the attacking model gains an Abandoned token.

actions.name: Lost and Alone
actions.effects: If the target has an Abandoned token, this attack has a raise value of 3 and the target may not cheat this duel. Move the target up to 3". If the target has an Abandoned token, increase this move by +3".

triggers.name: Pulled Into the Story
triggers.text: Make a number of Scheme markers within 1" of the target up to the number of raises this attack received.

tokens.name: Abandoned
tokens.text: Referenced by Each Flaw Tells a Story and Lost and Alone abilities/actions

extraction_notes: Abandoned token is mentioned in abilities and actions but its full rules text is not defined on this crew card
